name: oh-my-grokbuild
description: Compatibility manifest for hosts that discover Claude-style markdown skills.
_provenance: Grok Claude-compatibility manifest. oh-my-grokbuild is a Grok Build plugin; this shim lets Grok's documented Claude-compat loader discover skills/omgb/SKILL.md alongside the root plugin.json. See https://docs.x.ai/build/features/skills-plugins-marketplaces and README.md.
